product_updates.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
product_updates.content: Spotify is releasing new audiobook plans later this year

product_updates.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
product_updates.content: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets

product_updates.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
product_updates.content: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

product_updates.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive “universal” AI interface
product_updates.content: Brett Adcock's new AI startup is now valued at $6 billion by its investors.

product_updates.title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
product_updates.content: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

product_updates.title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
product_updates.content: The AI agents are coming. A lot of them.

product_updates.title: With aluminum prices up 20%, recycling startups bet on AI to cash in
product_updates.content: Recycling startups are using AI to improve the recovery of critical minerals like aluminum, aiming to build a massive source of the metal.

product_updates.title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
product_updates.content: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

product_updates.title: Anthropic says it’s about to have its first profitable quarter
product_updates.content: Anthropic has told its investors that it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Anthropic’s Code with Claude showed off coding’s future—whether you like it or not
technical_breakthroughs.content: The vibes were strong at Code with Claude, Anthropic’s two-day event for software developers in London that kicked off on May 19, the same day as Google’s I/O in Palo Alto. technical_breakthroughs.title: US government takes $2 billion equity stake in nine quantum computing firms
technical_breakthroughs.content: Beneficiaries include startup backed by firm with links to the Trump family.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: online safety’s future and climate tech’s big pivot

technical_breakthroughs.title: Climate tech companies are pivoting to critical minerals
technical_breakthroughs.content: We’re over a year into the second Trump administration here in the US, and support for climate causes is weak. But climate tech companies are finding ways to survive and even thrive in this new environment, including by focusing on potential benefits outside decarbonization. Suddenly, it feels li…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Tech researchers are suing the Trump administration over the future of online safety
technical_breakthroughs.content: Since its earliest days back in office, the Trump administration has been going after researchers who study and try to counter hate speech, harassment, propaganda, and disinformation online. Now, some of those researchers are fighting back. Last week their lawsuit—which could have global repercus…
